title: PLAYSTATION Gran Turismo 7 - PS5
subtitle: PLAYSTATION Gran Turismo 7
overview: Gran Turismo 7's got something for everyone. Whether you want to run wild in your dream car or get yourself a nice collection of gold trophies from 37 different tracks. Drop by the Gran Turismo Café to unlock new single-player challenges. Put your skills to the test against other players in Sport mode. Or complete fun mini-games in Missions. The countless customisation options and dynamic weather conditions make your driving experience even more realistic.Good to know- You can learn new tricks in the License Center and then practice them around the globe on the World Circuits- Collect hundreds of cars, from older classics to modern supercars – there's over 420 cars for you to pick from- Beat your closest rival in Split Screen multiplayer, or invite your friends to a Lobby and race together online- Enjoy the stunning details of vehicles and environment in 4K resolution and HDR at 60 FPS

title: THRUSTMASTER T128 Racing Wheel & Pedals
subtitle: THRUSTMASTER T128 Racing Wheel
overview: The key to a realistic driving sim is a wheel that makes it all feel genuine. This Thrustmaster T128 has immersive force feedback that lets you feel the track through your wheel – every surface, bump and slide. The engine speed LEDs make it really easy to whip through gears. And the magnetic paddle shifters use patented H.E.A.R.T technology, so they're responsive and feel more like real gear-shifters. All that tech brings your games to life, whether they're on PlayStation or PC.Good to know- The 13 action buttons let you easily map all the functions and controls you'll need in your game- Set it up anywhere – the quick attachment system is great for desks and tables up to 5.5 cm thick- The paddle shifters and pedals use H.E.A.R.T. technology, a contactless system of magnets, for nearly instant response and extra-long lifespan- The next-gen hybrid drive means its up to 20% more powerful than other Thrustmaster hybrid racing wheels

specs.value: 280 x 260 x 300 mm (H x W x D)

title: THRUSTMASTER T-GT II Racing Wheel & Pedals - Black
subtitle: THRUSTMASTER T-GT II Racing
overview: Getting competitively serious in Gran Turismo? This is the wheel and pedal set to win races with – it behaves like the real thing. The high-power brushless motor produces linear force feedback, so you'll feel every bit of your driving just right – that means you can react just right. Meanwhile the real-time drift curve calculation helps to keep full responsiveness and feedback in your skidding turns, accounting for every precise movement. And to tie it all up, there are 25 action buttons, so you'll stay in full control for the whole race.  Good to know  - Training and winning races take quite the while, so the wheel is made to last with real-world automotive industry standards - The steering wheel always stays absolutelly precise and responsive thanks to the F.O.C. algorithm with Hall Effect sensors - Officially licensed by PlayStation, the set is made for Gran Turismo and is compatible with PC, PS4 and PS5

specs.value: 310 x 525 x 380 mm (H x W x D)

title: THRUSTMASTER TCA Captain Pack X Airbus Edition Joystick & Throttle - Light Blue
subtitle: THRUSTMASTER TCA Captain Pack
overview: All aboard the virtual Airbus! This Thrustmaster TCA captain pack is a realistic 1:1 replica of the real Airbus airliner's iconic sidestick and quadrant. The joystick has a built-in thrust reverser mechanism that feels just like handling the real thing. And the quadrant has 4 axes and 31 action buttons. That gives you the accuracy and controls you need for a perfectly smooth landing.  Good to know  - The X in the name stands for Xbox – this sidestick's compatible with either PC or Xbox Series X|S - You can pick between 4 swappable joystick head button modules and find the one that works for you - There are 21 action buttons on the joystick - 14 are programmable, so you can adjust the controls to your liking - With two USB ports and a 3.5 mm jack, you can hook up more flight controls through this sidestick - Use the T.A.R.G.E.T software to program and tie together your whole cockpit, including any other parts you might add to your Airbus ecosystem

This air sim controller is officially licensed for Xbox and Windows with realistic controls for all types of flight simulation, be it commercial airliners or sci-fi space fighters.  Sit back in your seat and grab the handles. The ergonomic design ensures a comfortable grip, so no more hand cramps in the middle of a flight. All the buttons are intuitively placed, so you'll remain in control even in virtual reality.
